title: zanthoxylum dominianum
intro: Zanthoxylum dominianum, also known as the Australian pepperbush, is a species of flowering plant in the rue family, Rutaceae. This plant is native to eastern Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum dominianum include reducing pain and inflammation, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
